description: Simple and elegant, these sandals from catwalk epitomise minimalistic class. For those who are not fans of over the top embellishments in their ethnic ensembles, this pair is the right foot-style choice. Wear this with a simple light hued churidhar for maximum impact.UpperEmbellished midfoot strap made of synthetic leather with a toe separator Circular shaped embellishment on the axis of the sandalErgonomically designed footbed with mild cushioning for comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heels Picture pattern grooves on the forefootshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
